description: Vertical-specific style recommendations. Maps article type → best style + preset + customization notes.

saas.label: SaaS / Software / Dev Tools

hero_image.notes: Lead with the metric that matters. ARR, time saved, efficiency gain. Dark glass card with green or purple accent.

inline_images.notes: Founder-at-screen moments. The person behind the product. Blue monitor glow, isolation, focus.

social_share.notes: Monospace font, terminal energy but clean. Green accent (#00FF88) for dev tools, purple (#6C5CE7) for design tools.

saas.color_direction: Dark backgrounds, accent pops. Never bright/airy — SaaS content reads as authoritative in dark mode.

dtc_ecommerce.label: DTC / E-Commerce / Consumer Products

hero_image.notes: Product as hero but in context. Dark walnut, dramatic light, single specular highlight on product. Luxury feel.

inline_images.notes: Product in use. Real environments. Morning light, lived-in spaces. Show the life the product fits into.

social_share.notes: Cream background, dark serif text. Editorial newsletter feel. DTC audience responds to warmth not tech-dark.

comparison_hero.notes: When comparing brands (Ridge vs Bellroy), use dark data card with split metrics. Two accent colors, one per brand.

dtc_ecommerce.color_direction: Warm earth tones for lifestyle shots. Dark and premium for product heroes. Never clinical/sterile.

newsletter_creator.label: Newsletter / Creator Economy / Personal Brand

hero_image.notes: The person writing the newsletter. Editorial portrait, natural light, real workspace. Builds parasocial trust.

inline_images.notes: Subscriber counts, open rates, revenue milestones. Green sparklines. The metrics creators care about.

social_share.notes: Maximum contrast. White on black. The headline IS the image. Works at thumbnail size on X and LinkedIn.

author_headshot.notes: Golden hour, aspirational but real. Not corporate headshot energy — more magazine profile.

newsletter_creator.color_direction: Mix of warm editorial (cream/serif for sophistication) and dark bold (for scroll-stopping social). Author shots always warm.

agency_marketing.label: Agency / Marketing Services / Growth

hero_image.notes: Authority and stakes. Conference room energy, afternoon light through blinds. The weight of real business.

inline_images.notes: Client results as dark dashboard cards. ROAS, CPA, revenue lift. Red accent for urgency, green for wins.

social_share.notes: Modern SaaS aesthetic signals competence. Purple gradient says 'we understand tech' without being developer-bro.

team_culture.notes: Behind the scenes of the agency. Real workspaces, real people. Warm, productive, not corporate.

agency_marketing.color_direction: Professional but not corporate. Dark for results/data, warm for people/culture. Purple and deep blue as accent colors.
avoid: anything that looks like stock photography

ai_tech.label: AI / Automation / Agent Ecosystem

hero_image.notes: The builder at work. Monitor glow as key light. Multiple screens showing dashboards/code. Fincher palette.

inline_images.notes: Before/after efficiency metrics. Time saved, tasks automated, cost reduced. Blue/cyan accent for AI content.

social_share.notes: Monospace font, green-on-black. Terminal aesthetic but polished — Supabase marketing level, not hacker movie.

workflow_diagram.notes: Custom — use dark_data base but describe a flow/pipeline instead of a single metric. Nodes and arrows on dark glass.

ai_tech.color_direction: Dark mode everything. Blue (#4FACFE) for AI/intelligence, green (#00FF88) for automation/efficiency, cyan for data. Never warm/earthy.
avoid: anything that feels analog or handmade

finance_revenue.label: Finance / Revenue / Business Strategy

hero_image.notes: The big number. Revenue, valuation, market size. Green accent for growth, white on near-black. Bloomberg energy.

inline_images.notes: Multiple metric cards for comparisons. Different accent colors per metric. Keep consistent dark base.

social_share.notes: The number IS the headline. '$200M/Year' in massive white Impact. Nothing else competing.

executive_portrait.notes: When the article is about a person (CEO, founder). Dramatic stage/backstage lighting. Authority energy.

finance_revenue.color_direction: Dark and serious. Green for revenue/growth, red for losses/risk, white for maximum contrast. No playful colors.
